title: heliophila refracta
intro: Heliophila refracta, also known as the rock heliophila, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Heliophila refracta include its potential to treat various ailments such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. Heliophila refracta can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
